# Load the provided JSON files and inspect for matching ayah/hadith
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
with open(hpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    h = json.load(f)

len(q), len(h), list(q.keys())[:10] if isinstance(q, dict) else None

# Inspect first few entries of q
q[:3]

# The target text from user:
target_full = "وَمَا كَانَ لِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ نَفَـٰقَةُۢ وَلَاۢ هُوَ يَعۡلَمُ مَا فِىٓ غَيۡبِ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَٰلِمُۢ بِمَا تَعۡمَلُونَ"
# Let's search exact match
matches_exact = [entry for entry in q if entry.get('ayah_text') == target_full]
len(matches_exact), matches_exact[:2]

# Define normalization function
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[ًٌٍَُِّْٰٕٓۖۗۘٓٔ]""")
# The above includes several combining marks; but better to use unicodedata category Mn (nonspacing mark)
def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # Normalize unicode
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace("ـ", "")
    # Replace Arabic diacritics by removing combining marks, using unicodedata to remove Mn marks
    # But keep Arabic letters
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in text if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # Replace alef variants and hamza
    text = text.replace('آ', 'ا').replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('ٱ', 'ا')
    # Remove punctuation and symbols except Arabic letters and numbers: remove things like punctuation, small signs, ornate characters
    # Keep Arabic letters and spaces and numbers
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)  # this also removes diacritics used as single characters, but we've removed combining marks
    # Make lower (though Arabic has no case)
    text = text.lower()
    # Collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

# Test normalize on target
norm_target = normalize_ar(target_full)
norm_target

# Build mapping normalized ayah_text to entries
from collections import defaultdict
norm_map = defaultdict(list)
for entry in q:
    s = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    n = normalize_ar(s)
    norm_map[n].append(entry)

# Now search for normalized match of target
matches_norm = norm_map.get(norm_target, [])
len(matches_norm)

# Define similarity metrics
def lcs_len(a, b):
    # compute length of LCS of strings a,b
    # dynamic programming O(n*m) but manageable for <=200 chars
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # Use optimized DP with two rows
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        cur = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                cur[j] = prev[j-1]+1
            else:
                cur[j] = max(prev[j], cur[j-1])
        prev = cur
    return prev[m]

def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    if not a and not b:
        return 1.0
    if not a or not b:
        return 0.0
    l = lcs_len(a,b)
    return l / max(len(a), len(b))

def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    common = len(set(ta) & set(tb))
    if common == 0:
        return 0.0
    prec = common/len(ta)
    rec = common/len(tb)
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

# Compute similarity scores for all q entries vs target_norm
scores = []
for entry in q:
    cand = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    cand_norm = normalize_ar(cand)
    lr = lcs_ratio(cand_norm, norm_target)
    tf1 = token_f1(cand_norm, norm_target)
    scores.append((lr, tf1, cand_norm, entry))

# Sort by lcs_ratio then token f1
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
top = scores_sorted[:20]
[(round(s[0],3), round(s[1],3), s[3]['surah_name'], s[3]['ayah_id'], s[3]['ayah_text']) for s in top[:10]]

# Find entries containing 'سليمان' or 'سليmn' normalized
targets = ['سليمان','سليمن','نفقة','نفقة']
res = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    if 'سليمان' in n or 'سليمن' in n:
        res.append((entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], n))
len(res), res[:10]

# search for entries containing 'نفقة' in normalized form
res_nfq = [(entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text']) for entry in q if 'نفقة' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'نَفَقَة' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'نفقة' in normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))]
res_nfq[:20], len(res_nfq)

phrase = "يعلم ما في غيب السماوات والارض"
ph_norm = normalize_ar(phrase)
# search normalized contains
candidates = [(entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text'])) 
              for entry in q if ph_norm in normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(candidates), candidates[:20]

ph = normalize_ar("يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى")
candidates2 = [(entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], normalize_ar(entry['ayah_text'])) 
               for entry in q if ph in normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(candidates2), candidates2[:40]

tokens = ['يعلم','غيب','السموات','الارض']
cands = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    if all(tok in n for tok in tokens):
        cands.append((entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], n))
len(cands), cands[:20]

# search for normalized containing 'ما كان لسليمان' or variants
search_terms = ['ما كان لسليمان', 'ما كان لسليمن', 'ما كان لسليمان', 'ما كان ل سليمان', 'ما كان ل سليمان']
matches = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    if 'ما' in n and 'كان' in n and 'سليمان' in n:
        matches.append((entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], n))
len(matches), matches[:20]

# search for literal 'لِسُلَيْمَان' in entries
res_literal = [(entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text']) for entry in q if 'لِسُلَيْمَان' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'لِسُلَيْمَـٰن' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'لِسُلَيْمَـ' in entry.get('ayah_text','')]
len(res_literal), res_literal[:30]

# Update normalization to remove superscript alef and more diacritics (Mn and other specific marks)
def normalize_ar2(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", text)
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace("ـ", "")
    # Remove superscript alef U+0670
    text = text.replace("\u0670", "")
    # Remove combining marks (Mn)
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in text if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # Replace various alef/hamza forms
    text = text.replace('آ', 'ا').replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('ٱ', 'ا')
    # Remove punctuation/symbols except Arabic letters digits spaces
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    text = text.lower()
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

norm_target2 = normalize_ar2(target_full)
norm_target2

def normalize_ar3(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    text = unicodedata.normalize("NFC", text)
    # Replace superscript alef with alef
    text = text.replace("\u0670", "ا")
    # Remove tatweel
    text = text.replace("ـ", "")
    # Remove combining marks (diacritics)
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in text if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # Replace hamza/wasl etc with normal alef
    text = text.replace('آ', 'ا').replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('ٱ', 'ا')
    # Normalize alef maksura to ya maybe, but leave for now
    # Replace non-Arabic letters/punct
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', text)
    text = text.lower()
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

norm_target3 = normalize_ar3(target_full)
norm_target3

# Precompute normalized forms for q with normalize_ar3
for entry in q[:3]:
    entry['norm3'] = normalize_ar3(entry['ayah_text'])

# Now compute similarity for all entries vs norm_target3
scores = []
for entry in q:
    n = entry.get('norm3') or normalize_ar3(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    lr = lcs_ratio(n, norm_target3)
    tf1 = token_f1(n, norm_target3)
    scores.append((lr, tf1, entry))

scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
top = scores_sorted[:20]
[(round(s[0],3), round(s[1],3), s[2]['surah_name'], s[2]['ayah_id'], s[2]['ayah_text']) for s in top[:15]]

# Search for entries containing both 'سليمان' and 'تعملون' normalized
cands = []
for entry in q:
    n = normalize_ar3(entry.get('ayah_text',''))
    if 'سليمان' in n and 'تعملون' in n:
        cands.append((entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], n))
cands[:20], len(cands)

# Find verses starting with 'وَمَا كَانَ لِ' or containing 'وَمَا كَانَ' and 'لِس'
matches = [(entry['surah_name'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text']) for entry in q if entry.get('ayah_text','').startswith('وَمَا كَانَ لِ') or 'وَمَا كَانَ' in entry.get('ayah_text','') and 'سُلَيْمَان' in entry.get('ayah_text','')]
len(matches), matches[:50]

# find raw occurrences of 'نفقة' in ayah_text (including variants)
[entry for entry in q if 'نَفَقَة' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'نَفَقَةُ' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'نَفَـٰقَة' in entry.get('ayah_text','') or 'نفقة' in entry.get('ayah_text','')][:10]

# Inspect structure of hadith DB
h[:3]

# search hadiths for presence of tokens
tokens = ['سليمان','نفقة','غيب','السموات','الارض','يعلم']
hits = []
for entry in h:
    text = entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    n = normalize_ar3(text)
    if any(tok in n for tok in tokens):
        hits.append((entry.get('hadithID'), entry.get('title'), text[:120], [tok for tok in tokens if tok in n]))
len(hits), hits[:10]

# Prepare target tokens normalized
target_tokens = set(normalize_ar3(target_full).split())
target_tokens

# Search hadith entries for overlaps >= 3 tokens
candidates_hadith = []
for entry in h:
    text = entry.get('Matn') or entry.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    n = normalize_ar3(text)
    tokens = set(n.split())
    common = tokens & target_tokens
    if len(common) >= 3:
        # compute similarities
        lr = lcs_ratio(n, norm_target3)
        tf1 = token_f1(n, norm_target3)
        candidates_hadith.append((len(common), lr, tf1, entry['hadithID'], entry.get('title'), text[:200]))

# sort by common tokens then lr
candidates_hadith_sorted = sorted(candidates_hadith, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1], -x[2]))
len(candidates_hadith_sorted), candidates_hadith_sorted[:20]
